business_definition: A normalized operational issue requiring review, routing, escalation, or resolution.

fields.exception_id: The normalized identifier for the exception.
fields.exception_type: The normalized category of the exception.
fields.entity_id: The legal or operating entity associated with the exception where applicable.
fields.account_id: The account associated with the exception where applicable.
fields.source_contract_type: The contract type from which the exception was derived.
fields.source_contract_id: The source contract record identifier associated with the exception.
fields.status: The current normalized exception lifecycle state.
fields.opened_at: Timestamp when the exception was created/opened.
fields.summary: A short human-readable summary of the issue.
